SELECT * FROM ip_addresses WHERE ip > inet '192.168.1.0';
SELECT * FROM ip_addresses WHERE ip > (SELECT inet '192.168.1.4' FROM ip_addresses LIMIT 1);
CREATE TABLE network_devices (id INT, device_ip inet, device_name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO network_devices VALUES (1, inet '192.168.1.5', 'Router'), (2, inet '192.168.1.4', 'Switch');
SELECT d.device_name FROM network_devices d WHERE d.device_ip > inet '192.168.1.3' AND d.id IN (SELECT id FROM network_devices WHERE device_ip < inet '192.168.1.6');
CREATE TABLE device_logs (log_id INT, device_ip inet, log_date DATE);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device_logs WHERE device_ip > (SELECT MAX(device_ip) FROM ip_addresses);
SELECT d.device_name FROM network_devices d JOIN device_logs l ON d.device_ip = l.device_ip WHERE l.log_date > '2023-10-01' AND d.device_ip > inet '192.168.1.3';
SELECT l.log_id, d.device_name FROM device_logs l JOIN network_devices d ON l.device_ip = d.device_ip WHERE l.device_ip > inet '192.168.1.5' AND l.log_date BETWEEN '2023-10-01' AND '2023-10-31';
